markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Review content strategy and refine the approach for technical clients.](https://fathom.video/share/zrEcGgDz6QChtViJxzUGED2H8VKNX8sx?tab=summary&timestamp=234.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Adopt a "First Principles" Strategy:** For technical clients with no content, build foundational credibility by creating a "study guide" that cites respected experts. This establishes authority before tackling advanced topics.](https://fathom.video/share/zrEcGgDz6QChtViJxzUGED2H8VKNX8sx?tab=summary&timestamp=707.0)
  - [**Prioritize Content Refresh:** For clients with declining traffic (e.g., Spendesk), focus on refreshing existing high-value pages. This is the fastest path to recovery, as new content alone cannot offset the drop.](https://fathom.video/share/zrEcGgDz6QChtViJxzUGED2H8VKNX8sx?tab=summary&timestamp=1500.0)
  - [**Reverse Presentation Flow:** In strategy decks, present topic clusters first to capture attention. Follow with the research methodology that informed the strategy, building trust without causing fatigue.](https://fathom.video/share/zrEcGgDz6QChtViJxzUGED2H8VKNX8sx?tab=summary&timestamp=1874.0)
  - [**Write with "Bottom Line Up Front":** Use direct, concise language that solves the reader's problem immediately. Avoid fluff and overly academic intros to maintain engagement and build credibility.](https://fathom.video/share/zrEcGgDz6QChtViJxzUGED2H8VKNX8sx?tab=summary&timestamp=3300.0)

## Topics

### Problem: Ineffective Content Strategy

  - [Marcel reviewed two content strategies, identifying issues that undermine credibility and engagement.](https://fathom.video/share/zrEcGgDz6QChtViJxzUGED2H8VKNX8sx?tab=summary&timestamp=234.0)
  - [**Client 1 (New, Technical):** The strategy was too broad and lacked foundational credibility.](https://fathom.video/share/zrEcGgDz6QChtViJxzUGED2H8VKNX8sx?tab=summary&timestamp=300.0)
      - [**Why it matters:** A skeptical, technical audience requires a deep, first-principles approach to build trust.](https://fathom.video/share/zrEcGgDz6QChtViJxzUGED2H8VKNX8sx?tab=summary&timestamp=384.0)
  - [**Client 2 (Established, Declining Traffic):** The strategy deck buried the lead by spending 8 minutes on competitor analysis before presenting the topic clusters.](https://fathom.video/share/zrEcGgDz6QChtViJxzUGED2H8VKNX8sx?tab=summary&timestamp=1249.0)
      - [**Why it matters:** This structure causes audience fatigue and risks losing their attention before the core strategy is revealed.](https://fathom.video/share/zrEcGgDz6QChtViJxzUGED2H8VKNX8sx?tab=summary&timestamp=1249.0)

### Solution: A New Framework for Technical Clients

  - [For technical clients with no content, adopt a "study guide" framework:](https://fathom.video/share/zrEcGgDz6QChtViJxzUGED2H8VKNX8sx?tab=summary&timestamp=707.0)
      - [**Goal:** Educate the market and become the definitive resource.](https://fathom.video/share/zrEcGgDz6QChtViJxzUGED2H8VKNX8sx?tab=summary&timestamp=960.0)
      - [**Method:**](https://fathom.video/share/zrEcGgDz6QChtViJxzUGED2H8VKNX8sx?tab=summary&timestamp=790.0)
          - [Map topics in a logical, educational sequence.](https://fathom.video/share/zrEcGgDz6QChtViJxzUGED2H8VKNX8sx?tab=summary&timestamp=790.0)
          - [Cite respected experts and publications to build authority.](https://fathom.video/share/zrEcGgDz6QChtViJxzUGED2H8VKNX8sx?tab=summary&timestamp=632.0)
          - [Prioritize information density over verbosity.](https://fathom.video/share/zrEcGgDz6QChtViJxzUGED2H8VKNX8sx?tab=summary&timestamp=667.0)
      - [**Presentation:** Frame this foundational work as the first topic cluster.](https://fathom.video/share/zrEcGgDz6QChtViJxzUGED2H8VKNX8sx?tab=summary&timestamp=944.0)

### Solution: A New Framework for Established Clients

  - [For clients with declining traffic, the priority is content refresh.](https://fathom.video/share/zrEcGgDz6QChtViJxzUGED2H8VKNX8sx?tab=summary&timestamp=1500.0)
      - [**Spendesk Example:** Traffic is falling, with 3 URLs accounting for 80% of the drop.](https://fathom.video/share/zrEcGgDz6QChtViJxzUGED2H8VKNX8sx?tab=summary&timestamp=1500.0)
      - [**Action:** Focus heavily on auditing and refreshing these high-value pages.](https://fathom.video/share/zrEcGgDz6QChtViJxzUGED2H8VKNX8sx?tab=summary&timestamp=1500.0)
      - [**Rationale:** New content alone cannot offset the traffic loss from existing assets.](https://fathom.video/share/zrEcGgDz6QChtViJxzUGED2H8VKNX8sx?tab=summary&timestamp=1847.0)

### Solution: A New Framework for Writing & Presentation

  - [**Presentation Flow:** Reverse the order in strategy decks.](https://fathom.video/share/zrEcGgDz6QChtViJxzUGED2H8VKNX8sx?tab=summary&timestamp=1874.0)
      - [**New Flow:** Topic Clusters → Research Methodology](https://fathom.video/share/zrEcGgDz6QChtViJxzUGED2H8VKNX8sx?tab=summary&timestamp=1874.0)
      - [**Rationale:** Captures attention immediately and builds trust efficiently.](https://fathom.video/share/zrEcGgDz6QChtViJxzUGED2H8VKNX8sx?tab=summary&timestamp=1874.0)
  - [**Writing Style:** Adopt a "Bottom Line Up Front" (BLUF) approach.](https://fathom.video/share/zrEcGgDz6QChtViJxzUGED2H8VKNX8sx?tab=summary&timestamp=3300.0)
      - [**Example:** A BlackSoul listicle was critiqued for praising a competitor. A BLUF rewrite immediately stated the problem, demonstrating a more effective, direct style.](https://fathom.video/share/zrEcGgDz6QChtViJxzUGED2H8VKNX8sx?tab=summary&timestamp=2940.0)
      - [**Rationale:** Directness solves the reader's problem quickly, building credibility.](https://fathom.video/share/zrEcGgDz6QChtViJxzUGED2H8VKNX8sx?tab=summary&timestamp=3300.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**William:**](https://fathom.video/share/zrEcGgDz6QChtViJxzUGED2H8VKNX8sx?tab=summary&timestamp=1865.0)
      - [Get GSC/GA access for Spendesk.](https://fathom.video/share/zrEcGgDz6QChtViJxzUGED2H8VKNX8sx?tab=summary&timestamp=1865.0)
      - [Revise the Spendesk strategy to prioritize content refresh.](https://fathom.video/share/zrEcGgDz6QChtViJxzUGED2H8VKNX8sx?tab=summary&timestamp=1865.0)
  - [**Sydney:**](https://fathom.video/share/zrEcGgDz6QChtViJxzUGED2H8VKNX8sx?tab=summary&timestamp=3464.0)
      - [Integrate the "Bottom Line Up Front" principle into writing guidelines.](https://fathom.video/share/zrEcGgDz6QChtViJxzUGED2H8VKNX8sx?tab=summary&timestamp=3464.0)
  - [**All:**](https://fathom.video/share/zrEcGgDz6QChtViJxzUGED2H8VKNX8sx?tab=summary&timestamp=707.0)
      - [Adopt the "study guide" framework for new technical clients.](https://fathom.video/share/zrEcGgDz6QChtViJxzUGED2H8VKNX8sx?tab=summary&timestamp=707.0)
      - [Reverse the presentation flow in future strategy decks.](https://fathom.video/share/zrEcGgDz6QChtViJxzUGED2H8VKNX8sx?tab=summary&timestamp=1874.0)
